startroom.description:
Feeling your way through the darkness, you repeatedly bump into long tables and rows of chairs.
The chamber is large, resembling some kind of great dining hall where people once gathered before the darkness claimed it.
There are three exits.
To the west lies a small <g>side room<g>.(maybe somewhere you could hide?)
To the south stands a <g>second entrance<g> that refuses to budge.
The <g>main entrance<g> seems to be to your east.
The <g>main entrance<g> and <g>second entrance<g> lead into the unknown.
startroom.description2:
This is a large room with several long tables and chairs all around you, maybe this is some sort of eating hall? 
 there are three doors you could find while stumbling about 
 one to the west that leads to what seems to be a side room 
 a door that won't budge to the south, 
 and a door on the east side of the room that leads out

sideroom.description:
You find yourself in a small side chamber of unknown purpose. The room is cramped and quiet, with bare walls closing in around you.
The silence here feels protective rather than threatening, making this seem like a good place to hide should danger draw near.
The only exit is the <g>side room<g> door, leading back to the chamber from which you came

hallway1.description:
You are standing at one end of a long corridor that seems to connect much of the dungeon.
The air is cold and still, and your footsteps echo into the darkness ahead.
You cannot tell where the corridor ends, but through touch you discover several doorways nearby.
On the north wall is the <g>main entrance<g> leading back to the dining hall, 
Further along the north wall you feel a door to another <g>small room<g>.
Next to the <g>small room<g> is a <g>locked door<g> that is sealed shut.
To the north is an <g>open room<g>, from which a faint stale smell drifts into the corridor.
You may also continue down the corridor toward the <g>turn corner<g>, where the passage disappears into darkness

kniferoom.description:
You are in a small chamber with shelves along the walls, the floor here is unnaturally smooth 
 there are a few knives on one of the shelves, this could be an armoury of some kind 
 there is only one door, back into the corridor

vinesroom.description:
You find yourself in a cramped chamber, small enough that you can nearly touch both walls with your arms outstretched. The air is dry with a strange warm wind that doesn't seem to originate from a single source.
To your east stands an overgrown doorway choked with thick vines. The passage beyond is completely blocked. You will need to cut through the vines before you can enter the <g>side entrance<g>.
To the south is the <g>small room<g> door, leading back the way you came in
vinesroom.description2:
You are in a small room tight enough to reach both walls with your arms out, with two doors 
 one back to the corridor to the south 
 and one to the east with the remains of the vines you cut scattered across the floor nearby

tabletroom.description:
You find yourself in a room of unusual design. A series of wide steps rise away from you, forming a terraced chamber that climbs toward the far side of the room.
As you carefully make your way forward, your foot catches on something. Reaching down, your hands find a body sprawled across the steps.
The body lies completely still.
Its warmth suggests it has not been here for long.
Every instinct tells you to leave it alone, yet the possibility of useful supplies is difficult to ignore.
 The <g>locked door<g> to your east will not open. Whether it is locked or sealed by some ancient rune, you cannot tell
tabletroom.description2:
This room is formed of a terraced design, steps leading up and away to the far side of the room 
 The corpse is still present, now lacking what you took

hallway2.description:
You have ventured deeper into the corridor.
You hesitate, fear tightening your chest as the darkness presses in around you. For a moment, your fear gets the best of you.
You consider <g>go back<g> to the first hallway but you push on.
 You discover four doors branching from the passage.The <g>first door<g> to the east feels cold.
Further along the eastern wall of the passage, you discover yet another <g>side entrance<g>.
There is a <g>glass door<g> to the west that seems different from the others 
At the far end of the corridor stands the <g>end door<g>, silent and unmoving in the darkness.
These doors seem to be sealed by the same dark magic as the terraced chamber.
The passage seems to continue further west around a <g>turn corner<g>, where the darkness feels heavier.
Ahead, something breathes heavily in the dark. A presence, its movements uneven and unnatural.
Whatever the creature is, it is blocking the only way forward
hallway2.description2:
You are somewhere in the middle of the corridor, there doesn't seem to be anything immediately around you 
 but there are four doors here, all of them seem sealed 
one at the northern end of this section 
one to the east 
one to the west that seems different from the others 
and one to the south 
you could go back up the corridor 
but you hear something lurking and grumbling further down the corridor, best not to continue that way

hallway3.description:
The hallway before you stretches into darkness, thick with stale air and the faint smell of sweat and decay.
 The is a <g>main entrance<g> on the south facing wall.
The corridor continues around a <g>turn corner<g> to the west

hallway4.description:
You find yourself in the fourth section of the corridor
It is quiet and the air is cold and still.
At the northern end stands the <g>end door<g>, a heavy door that feels strangely familiar, though your exhausted mind cannot place why.
To the east is a <g>side door<g>, slightly ajar
The silence here feels unnatural, broken only by the distant hum of the dungeon around you

renovatedroom.description:
You find yourself in an unfinished room. Dust hangs thick in the air, clinging to your skin with every movement.
Through touch, you sense exposed timber and cold metal beams jutting from the walls like ribs.
It feels like tools or maybe weapons are scattered across the floor.
As you search through the clutter, your hand closes around a long handle attached to a massive steel head.
 Must be a war hammer you think to yourself.
The air smells of forged steel, but beneath it lingers something older. as if the room has been stripped open and left mid-repair.
Behind you is the <g>first door<g> you entered though.
On the south side of the room is a <g>side entrance<g> that leads deeper into the unknown

spidersroom.description:
You find yourself in a small, claustrophobic cave. You feel what appears to be a large egg sac blocking the exit out. Fear grips you as you realise, you are in a monster's nest. 
The room has a <g>side entrance<g> and a blocked <g>main entrance<g>
spidersroom.description2:
The nest is filled with eggs, sure to hatch at any moment. You should escape before they kill you.
The <g>side entrance<g> remains unblocked, while the <g>main entrance<g> is now open.

smashingroom.description:
You find yourself in a large, mostly open chamber, with tables around the sides and one in the middle 
like many other rooms, the tables here seem to have many strange obelisk sculptures in rows, 
if you smashed something in here it would get the lurker's attention 
there are two doors here, one to the corridor at the north end 
and another door at the west end of the chamber
smashingroom.description2: You can hear the lurker coming from the corridor, you should leave out the west door

eyesroom.description:
You find yourself in another terraced chamber 
strangely, despite your blindness you swear you can see several menacing red eyes bearing down on you from above 
there are two doors in this chamber, one <g>side entrance<g> to the other room 
and a <g>main entrance<g> out to the corridor 
you are in immediate danger and need to <g>attack<g>
eyesroom.description2:
You are in a large terraced chamber filled with the remains of strange monliths you have smashed 
you swear these bore glowing red eyes, but darkness has returned... 
you are no longer certain what was real and what wasn't, or isn't 

there are two doors, one <g>side entrance<g> to the other room 
and a <g>main entrance<g> out to the corridor

keyroom.description:
You squeeze into a cramped storage chamber lined with shelves filled with strange containers and damp cloth bundles.
Sharp chemical fumes sting your nose, this room must be full of ancient potions and alchemical mixtures.
 As your hands move through the clutter, something small and metallic shifts softly in the dark, some sort of <g>key<g>
keyroom.description2:
You squeeze into a cramped storage chamber lined with shelves filled with strange containers and damp cloth bundles.
Sharp chemical fumes sting your nose, this room must be full of ancient potions and alchemical mixtures.

staircase.description:
You find yourself at the top of a staircase descending deep into darkness.
The air below feels colder, heavier, as though something is waiting beneath you.
As you take your first cautious step, your footing slips slightly.
The stairs are wet. Your pulse quickens as you descend further into the black, imagining crimson footprints trailing behind you.
